title: Instruction generation using one or more neural networks
abstract: Apparatuses, systems, and techniques are presented for generating instructional text. In at least one embodiment, an instructional video is analyzed to determine logical steps of a process or task demonstrated in that video, and instructive text is generated for those logical steps.
claims: 1. One or more processors, comprising: circuitry to use one or more bidirectional attention mechanisms of one or more neural networks to identify a plurality of frames of a video based, at least in part, on one or more steps of a process illustrated in the plurality of frames, and to generate one or more computer programs to cause the one or more steps to be performed.
